Staff CHAR 1 Psychosocial well-being: unsettled relationships - covert/open conflict with staff. 0 = No, 1 = Yes, "-" = Unknown, -2 = Space.
195 F2B F2B_CONFLCT_RMMATE (F2B) Unhappy With Roommate CHAR 1 Psychosocial well-being: unsettled relationships - unhappy with roommate. 0 = No, 1 = Yes, "-" = Unknown, -2 = Space.
196 F2C F2C_CONFLT_OTH_RES (F2C) Unhappy With Residents Other Than Roommate CHAR 1 Psychosocial well-being: unsettled relationships - unhappy with other residents. 0 = No, 1 =
